caption: A disassembled mechanical gear assembly, likely from a vehicle's transmission or engine, sits on a cluttered workbench. The assembly features several interconnected metal gears, including a large circular gear and smaller drive gears, housed within a light-colored metal casing. The workbench is strewn with various tools, including pliers, a screwdriver with an orange handle, and a blue socket set organizer. In the background, a bright orange plastic storage bin and a red toolbox are visible. No people are present in the scene. Across the frames, the camera remains stationary and the scene is static; there is no visible movement of the gears or tools, and no on-screen text or logos are present. The lighting is consistent, showing a workshop environment where a mechanical repair or inspection is taking place.
